betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Sensor glasses grant you the ability to see ores through walls, but not in the same way x-ray mods do.

Instead they project ores near you on a 2D plane within 5 blocks away from you. They don't tell you which ore but they work on just about every ore including ancient debris. Think about using them like a radar and I highly recomend looking down to orient yourself, it's hard to explain and honestly these aren't even worth it since they take up your helmet slot.

Also in order for them to work you need to press the key to activate them.
